task:
OBJECTIVE: Create /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/success/page.tsx

The Reckoning screen. Shown after payment confirms. Displays the commitment the user just backed.

Add "use client" at top.

Reads from URL search params: truth, commitment, stakeAmount, forfeitDestination, dueDate.

After mount call POST /api/commitments/save with all params from the URL plus avoidedTruth = truth.
On success store the returned id in state.

Render:
- Large heading: "Your word is backed."
- The truth (what they committed to face)
- The commitment text (what they will do)
- The stake amount formatted as currency
- "If you don't follow through, your money goes to:" + forfeitDestination
- Due date formatted as readable date
- A "I followed through" button — on click POST to /api/commitments/checkin with { id } then show "Commitment honoured. Your money is coming back."
- Subtext: "Come back by [due date]. Your word is on the line."

No Tailwind. Background #FAFAF8, accent #3D5A36.

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/success/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
"use client" at top
Calls save on mount
Shows all commitment details
Follow-through button present
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: use Tailwind
DO NOT: use ast.parse
